title: Mochi project worktree-isolation settings
description: Per-project settings that control how Mochi isolates parallel sessions. Each session runs in its own git worktree on its own branch (~/Maestro/worktrees/<projectId>/<sessionId>). These fields are stored on the Project record and editable via the updateProject RPC. The committed, teammate-shared counterpart to `copyGlobs` is a `.worktreeinclude` file at the repo root, which takes precedence when present.

defaultBaseBranch.description: Branch new session worktrees are created from (e.g. 'main', 'origin/master'). When unset, Mochi auto-detects it from origin/HEAD.

setupScript.description: Shell command run once (login shell, in the worktree) right after a new session worktree is created — install deps, generate files, init per-workspace resources. Receives the MOCHI_* env (see x-mochi-env).

copyGlobs.description: Gitignored files copied into each new session worktree so an isolated session can actually run (env files, local config, certs). Glob's last path segment may contain '*'. A committed `.worktreeinclude` at the repo root overrides this. Defaults to ['.env*'] when neither is set.

runMode.description: Whether sessions of this project may run their dev server / background tasks at the same time. 'concurrent' → every session gets its own isolated MOCHI_PORT block and may run in parallel. 'nonconcurrent' → the project depends on one fixed port / local DB / Docker stack, so only one session may have a live background run at a time; a second is refused with a clear message until the first stops.

x-mochi-env.description: Environment variables injected into each session's background processes and setup script — the per-session isolation contract, analogous to Conductor's CONDUCTOR_* set.
x-mochi-env.MOCHI_PORT: First port of this session's isolated 10-port block (e.g. 41000). Use $MOCHI_PORT in `npm run dev` so parallel sessions don't collide.
x-mochi-env.MOCHI_PORT_RANGE: The session's full block, e.g. '41000-41009'. Companion services can use $MOCHI_PORT+1 … +9.
x-mochi-env.MOCHI_WORKSPACE_PATH: Absolute path to this session's worktree.
x-mochi-env.MOCHI_IS_LOCAL: '1' on the user's Mac, '0' in a cloud workspace.
